testcase.name: setup

error.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'MOHAMMAD', ip: '192.168.0.114' Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 8.1', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.3', java.version: '17.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], binary: C:\Users\Gulrez\.cache\sele..., extensions: []}}]}]
